hero.description: Pinnacle Commercial Cleaning delivers quality-focused, hassle-free cleaning for medical centres, childcare centres, offices, display homes and dealerships across Sydney. Leave the cleaning to the experts, and get back to running your business.

services.title: Medical Centre Cleaning
services.description: Hygiene-first cleaning for medical and dental practices, built around infection control and patient-ready presentation.

services.title: Childcare Centre Cleaning
services.description: Safe, thorough cleaning for early learning environments, because nothing matters more than a child's wellbeing.

services.title: Open House & Display Home Cleaning
services.description: Presentation-perfect cleans that help display homes and open homes put their absolute best foot forward.

services.title: Medium to Large Office Spaces
services.description: Reliable, scheduled cleaning that keeps busy workplaces professional, welcoming and productive.

services.title: Automotive Dealerships
services.description: Showroom-standard cleaning that keeps your dealership floor as sharp as the vehicles on it.

why_us.title: Quality-First, Hassle-Free
why_us.description: We focus on quality with hassle-free customer satisfaction, every visit, every site.

why_us.title: Dedicated QC Manager
why_us.description: Every client is assigned their own Quality Control Manager, at no extra charge.

why_us.title: Genuine Care
why_us.description: Our point of difference isn't just what we clean: it's the care we bring to it.

why_us.title: More Time for Your Business
why_us.description: Leave the cleaning to the experts, and focus on growing what matters most.

members.name: Bojan Bliznjakovic
members.bio: Leads every client partnership personally, with hands-on care from first quote to final walkthrough.

members.name: Lana Bliznjakovic
members.bio: Personally ensures every site meets the Pinnacle standard, assigned to your business at no extra cost.

members.name: Milenko Bliznjakovic
members.bio: Ensures every job is completed safely and to Australian industry standards, leading quality inspections and the training of our cleaning team.

faq.question: How quickly will I receive a quote?
faq.answer: After your free on-site inspection, you'll receive a tailored, obligation-free quote within 24 hours, no waiting weeks to get started.

faq.question: Do you offer one-off cleans or ongoing contracts?
faq.answer: Both. Whether you need a single display home clean or an ongoing office contract, we tailor our service around what you actually need.

faq.question: What areas do you service?
faq.answer: We service commercial properties across Sydney and surrounding suburbs. Get in touch and we'll confirm we cover your location.

faq.question: What makes Pinnacle different from other cleaning companies?
faq.answer: Every client is assigned a dedicated Quality Control Manager at no extra charge, so quality is never left to chance. That's Care and Commitment in action.
